top_patterns.description: Blake shares personal stories or insights, then invites reflection or action.
top_patterns.structure_template: Personal story/lesson + hashtag + call to action or reflection
example_quotes: I built TOMS, gave away 100 million shoes, and still ended up in the darkest place of my life.
Healing rarely arrives in one big breakthrough, it grows through small practices repeated with patience and honesty.

top_patterns.description: Starts with a question prompting self-awareness or perspective shift.
example_quotes: Ask yourself, “what am I stressed about RIGHT NOW?”
Before you correct your child today ask yourself one question, is this about their growth or my fear?

top_patterns.description: Mentions achievements but emphasizes internal worth or lessons learned.
top_patterns.structure_template: Achievement + realization of worth or lesson
example_quotes: I built TOMS, gave away 100 million shoes, and sold the company for over $600 million — and two years ago I thought about taking my own life.
Success can sometimes hide what’s really going on inside. Real change begins when you stop trying to prove yourself.

archetypal_structures.formula: Personal story or achievement + lesson learned + hashtags
example_quotes: I started TOMS with $3,000, no investors, and no experience in footwear — just an idea I couldn't stop thinking about.
The wound underneath it all was one core belief: I was not enough.

archetypal_structures.formula: Pose a question + offer insight or advice
example_quotes: Ask yourself, “what am I stressed about RIGHT NOW?”
Before you correct your child today ask yourself one question, is this about their growth or my fear?

archetypal_structures.formula: Achievement + realization of internal worth or change
example_quotes: I built TOMS, gave away 100 million shoes, and still ended up in the darkest place of my life.
Success never fixed the feeling that I was not enough.

closers: Take what’s useful and leave the rest.
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: Mostly short, punchy sentences with occasional longer reflections.
language_habits.line_break_style: Mostly paragraph style with some line breaks for emphasis.

example_quotes: I built TOMS with $3,000, no investors, and no experience.
Success never fixed the feeling that I was not enough.
Ask yourself, “what am I stressed about RIGHT NOW?”

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Highlights internal growth over external validation.
example_quotes: Success can sometimes hide what’s really going on inside.

anti_patterns: Lack of specific examples or stories

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake’s current voice emphasizes authenticity, vulnerability, and internal growth, blending personal stories with reflective questions.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift from purely achievement-focused to more introspective and mental health-oriented messaging.
